params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results by name or descriptor

items.docs: Returns a collection of integration systems configured in the tenant, including Studio-built integrations, core connectors, and document transformation integrations. Supports filtering by system name, type, and active status.

info.name: Workday Studio Retrieve a Specific Integration System

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified integration system with its full configuration details including template reference, launch parameters, schedule settings, and notification configuration.

info.name: Workday Studio Launch an Integration System

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Triggers execution of the specified integration system. Accepts optional launch parameters to control runtime behavior. Returns the newly created integration event representing the running integration instance.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: status
params.description: Filter events by execution status

params.name: fromDate
params.description: Filter events starting from this date

params.name: toDate
params.description: Filter events up to this date

items.docs: Returns a collection of integration event records showing the status and details of integration runs. Includes information about start time, end time, records processed, and any errors encountered during execution.

info.name: Workday Studio Retrieve a Specific Integration Event

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified integration event including run status, start time, end time, records processed, records failed, and any error messages generated during integration execution.

info.name: Workday Studio Retrieve Logs for an Integration Event

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the execution logs for the specified integration event, including step-by-step processing details, warning messages, and error traces useful for debugging Studio integration assemblies.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results by name or descriptor

items.docs: Returns a collection of Studio integration assemblies deployed to the tenant. Assemblies are the graphical representations of integration logic composed of configurable components such as mediation steps, transformations, and connectors.

info.name: Workday Studio Retrieve a Specific Integration Assembly

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified integration assembly with its component configuration, mediation chain details, and transformation mappings.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results by name or descriptor

items.docs: Returns a collection of available integration templates including core connectors and document transformation templates that can be used as starting points for building new Studio integrations.

info.name: Workday Studio Retrieve a Specific Integration Template

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified integration template with its configuration schema, supported services, and parameter definitions.

info.name: Workday Studio List Available Launch Parameters

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of launch parameter definitions that can be configured for integration systems to control runtime behavior such as date ranges, file paths, and processing options.
